dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6493 IH: National Oversight and Enforcement of Misconduct Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moulton introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To allow victims to sue Federal immigration enforcement officers for constitutional violations.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the National Oversight and Enforcement of Misconduct Act or the NOEM Act.

section.header: Civil action against person acting under federal immigration enforcement authority

subsection.text: Section 1979 of the Revised Statutes (42 U.S.C. 1983) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the first sentence, by inserting of any Federal immigration enforcement authority or before of any State.
